Pulse AI briefing

What matters this week

Al Reem Tower is currently at risk, with an 18-day delay driven mainly by MEP/podium coordination and unresolved authority submission dependencies. The fastest recovery path is to freeze the vertical core, resolve podium plant-room conflicts, and lock the fire strategy before the authority package date of 08-May-2026.

Project Pulse

    Planned 12 Jan 2026 · Actual 12 Jan 2026

    Planned 02 Feb 2026 · Actual 06 Feb 2026

Risk radar

Top open risks

3
  • High
    Fire strategy coordination not frozen
    Run 90-minute consultant/client decision workshop and freeze vertical core strategy.
  • High
    Plant room sizing conflicts with parking efficiency
    Issue coordinated MEP/parking overlay by 29-Apr-2026.
  • Medium
    Facade system cost not locked
    Request two façade supplier budget quotations before tender freeze.
